message:
bd-1q5.12, bd-3fc.7: Conformal predictor + golden frame test suites

bd-1q5.12: Add 31 unit tests for conformal prediction frame-time gating
covering calibration with known distributions, prediction interval coverage,
gate trigger boundary conditions, alpha sensitivity, empty/small calibration
sets, tracing span assertions, JSONL output, and multi-bucket interaction.

bd-3fc.7: Add golden.compare tracing span to verify_checksums with ERROR
logging on mismatch. Add 29 unit tests covering BLAKE3 hash correctness,
golden file I/O, hash comparison edge cases, bless mode round-trip, tracing
span assertions, GoldenResult formatting, and logger behavior. Fix
pre-existing test bug (sha256 prefix → blake3 prefix).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
